MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-07-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED SRIKING COMPLT FILED BY DEFENDANT TOWN SCHOOL FOR BOYS ELY IV, MR. W. BREWSTER
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO STRIKE FILED BY DEFENDANT TOWN SCHOOL FOR BOYS ELY IV, MR. W. BREWSTER
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-06-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS TOWN SCHOOL FOR BOYS AND MR. W. BREWSTER ELY IV'S (AMENDED) SPECIAL MOTION FOR ORDER STRIKING COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ALTHOUGH THE COURT RECOGNIZES THAT PLAINTIFF IS CURRENTLY INCARCERATED IN SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY JAIL, HE WAS PROPERLY SERVED AND COULD HAVE FILED AN OPPOSITION AND/OR REQUESTED A CONTINUANCE, BUT DID NEITHER. THE MOVING PAPERS ARE SUFFICIENT TO SATISFY DEFENDANTS' BURDEN THAT ALL OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS ARISE OUT OF ACTIVITIES PROTECTED BY THE ANTI-SLAPP STATUTE. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-26-2012 Off Calendar

(Amended) Notice Of Special Motion By Defts For Order Striking Complaint
Off Calendar Mar-07-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Matthew K. Wisinski, Esq., from LeClairRyan LLP, 415-913-4932, for Defendants and moving party

No other Appearance. Tentative Ruling is adopted.
DEFENDANTS TOWN SCHOOL FOR BOYS AND MR. W. BREWSTER ELY IV'S (Amended) Special Motion By Defendants For Order Striking Complaint is Granted. No opposition filed. Although the court recognizes tha plaintiff is currently incarcerated in San Francisco County Jail, he was properly served and could have filed an opposition and/or requested a continuance, but did neither. The moving papers are sufficient to satisfy defendants' burden that all of plaintiff's claims arise out of activities protected by the anti-SLAPP statute.
Order and judgment signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-06-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS TOWN SCHOOL FOR BOYS and MR. W. BREWSTER ELY IV'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. Continued to March 7, 2012 per the parties' request. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077
